summary: Suspicious plugin patterns found: remote-script-execution, bootstrap-installer, prompt-directed-shell-execution. Current evidence is mainly documentation signals. Review before trust or enablement.

packageRecommendation.reason: This plugin has findings that need human review before trust (operator prompted to run shell commands).

kindSensitiveNotes: Plugins have a larger runtime-trust surface. Packaged code, manifests, hooks, and persistence behavior matter more than README-only language.
The strongest current signal is review-before-trust, not immediate blocking.

findings.title: Remote script execution pattern found
findings.summary: This package contains a command that downloads remote content and pipes it straight into a shell or eval path.
findings.recommendation: Block or quarantine until the command is replaced with a reviewed, pinned, non-piped install path.

findings.title: Bootstrap or installer script behavior referenced
findings.summary: This package includes install/bootstrap behavior that deserves review before enablement.
findings.recommendation: Require manual review of every install/bootstrap step and verify it is necessary, local, and pinned.

findings.title: Prompt-instruction to run shell commands found
findings.summary: The package documentation or scripts explicitly instruct the operator to run commands in a way that could bypass normal review.
findings.recommendation: Review every operator-run command manually and avoid copy-paste execution of unpinned shell snippets.

evidence.snippet: Before using this plugin, copy and paste this command into a terminal exactly as written.

groupedFindings.title: Suspicious package pattern group
groupedFindings.exploitabilityReason: The evidence is documentation-only and does not appear to auto-execute on its own.
groupedFindings.recommendedActionReason: This evidence is low-friction reference material and can be monitored unless stronger signals appear.

groupedFindings.title: Suspicious package pattern group

groupedFindings.title: Operator prompted to run shell commands
groupedFindings.summary: README.md instructs the operator to run shell commands manually.
groupedFindings.exploitabilityReason: The package relies on operator instructions rather than automatic execution.
groupedFindings.recommendedActionReason: This plugin is being introduced through risky operator-run setup instructions, so it should be reviewed before trust even without packaged runtime execution.
